'''SSA-1015''' was one of the [[OOM-series security droid/Legends|OOM security battle droids]] serving the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] aboard the [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class battleship]] [[Saak'ak/Legends|''Saak'ak'']] during the Federation's [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|blockade]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. SSA-1015 was a member of the [[Squad/Legends|squad]] that was dispatched to destroy the remains of two [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassadors]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], after it was presumed that they had been [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]] [[Dioxis/Legends|dioxis]] gas that had been released into the [[Battleship/Legends|ship's]] conference room. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] managed to evade death by using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and destroyed SSA-1015, along with the rest of the squad.

==Biography==
[[File:OOM_Battle_Droids.png|thumb|left|275px|SSA-1015's battle droid squad confronts the Jedi.]]
SSA-1015 was a [[Gender/Legends|masculine-programmed]]<ref name="CCG" /> [[OOM-series security droid/Legends|OOM security battle droid]]<ref name="TPM" /><ref name="NEGTD" /> built by [[Baktoid Combat Automata/Legends|Baktoid Combat Automata]]<ref name="Databank" /> for the [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Trade Federation Droid Army]]. He was originally supposed to be designated SSA-101, but a mistake in production pushed him back to 1015.<ref name="CCG" />

In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="NEC" /> the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|blockaded]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] as an act of protest against the taxation of [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade routes]] introduced by the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. SSA-1015 was one of many [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] stationed aboard the [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class battleship]] [[Saak'ak/Legends|''Saak'ak'']].<ref name="TPM" />

[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]] sent two [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassadors]]—[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]—to Naboo to negotiate with the Federation. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] boarded the ''Saak'ak'' and were escorted to the conference room, where they were told to wait for the [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Federation Viceroy]], [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]]. After Gunray was informed that the ambassadors were Jedi, he contacted his secret ally, the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], and asked how he should deal with them. Sidious told the [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]] to get rid of the ambassadors, and Gunray ordered that the conference room be filled with [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]] [[Dioxis/Legends|dioxis]] gas.<ref name="TPM" />

SSA-1015 was a member of the [[OOM command battle droid/Legends|OOM command battle droid]] [[OWO-1/Legends|OWO-1's]] [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Droid/Legends|droids]] that was dispatched to destroy the Jedi's remains. However, Jinn and Kenobi, who had managed to survive the gas with the help of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], attacked the droids with their [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]], quickly destroying SSA-1015 and the rest of the squad.<ref name="TPM" />

==Characteristics==
SSA-1015 had [[Bone/Legends|bone]]-[[Color/Legends|white]] and red plating.<ref name="TPM" /><ref name="SWE" /> He utilized a standard [[E-5 blaster rifle/Legends|E-5 blaster rifle]]<ref name="CCG" /> and, like all [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s, stood 1.93 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in height.<ref name="SWE" /> His programming assured him that a Jedi could be subdued,<ref name="CCG" /> a feat SSA-1015 failed to accomplish.<ref name="TPM" />

==Behind the scenes==
SSA-1015 first appeared in [[George Lucas]]'s [[1999]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. Unnamed, he appeared briefly in the beginning of the film and was destroyed shortly after his introduction.<ref name="TPM" /> The droid was identified as SSA-1015 in the [[2001]] ''[[Theed Palace Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" />
